examples: Further scans are required to confirm the diagnosis of an abnormality.
Researchers are still trying to isolate the gene that causes this abnormality.
Caitlin was born with a life-threatening heart abnormality.
There can also be slight cases, and even those who don't feel any abnormality at all.
The tests - for alpha-fetoprotein levels - cannot predict if the baby will have an abnormality.
